verses.latin_vulgate: Verbum Domini, quod factum est ad Osee, filium Beeri, in diebus Oziæ, Joathan, Achaz, Ezechiæ, regum Juda ; et in diebus Jeroboam, filii Joas, regis Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֣ה ׀ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָיָ֗ה אֶל־הוֹשֵׁ֙עַ֙ בֶּן־בְּאֵרִ֔י בִּימֵ֨י עֻזִּיָּ֥ה יוֹתָ֛ם אָחָ֥ז יְחִזְקִיָּ֖ה מַלְכֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה וּבִימֵ֛י יָרׇבְעָ֥ם בֶּן־יוֹאָ֖שׁ מֶ֥לֶךְ יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: The word of the Lord, that came to Hosea, the son of Beeri, in the days of Ozias, Joathan, Achaz, and Ezechias, kings of Juda, and in the days of Jeroboam, the son of Joas, king of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Herran sana, joka tapahtui Hosealle, Beerin pojalle, Ussian, Jotamin, Ahaksen, Hiskian, Juudan kuningasten ajalla, ja Jerobeamin Joaksen pojan, Israelin kuninkaan ajalla.
verses.king_james: The word of the Lord that came unto Hosea, the son of Beeri, in the days of Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, and Hezekiah, kings of Judah, and in the days of Jeroboam the son of Joash, king of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Principium loquendi Domino in Osee. Et dixit Dominus ad Osee : Vade, sume tibi uxorem fornicationum, et fac tibi filios fornicationum, quia fornicans fornicabitur terra a Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּחִלַּ֥ת דִּבֶּר־יְהֹוָ֖ה בְּהוֹשֵׁ֑עַ {פ}וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶל־הוֹשֵׁ֗עַ לֵ֣ךְ קַח־לְךָ֞ אֵ֤שֶׁת זְנוּנִים֙ וְיַלְדֵ֣י זְנוּנִ֔ים כִּֽי־זָנֹ֤ה תִזְנֶה֙ הָאָ֔רֶץ מֵאַחֲרֵ֖י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The beginning of the Lord's speaking by Hosea: and the Lord said to Hosea: Go, take thee a wife of fornications, and have of her children of fornications: for the land by fornication shall depart from the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Herra rupesi ensisti Hosean kautta puhumaan, sanoi Herra Hosealle: Mene, ota portto aviokses, ja porton lapset; sillä maakunta karkaa pois Herralta huoruuteen.
verses.king_james: The beginning of the word of the Lord by Hosea. And the Lord said to Hosea, Go, take unto thee a wife of whoredoms and children of whoredoms: for the land hath committed great whoredom, departing from the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et abiit, et accepit Gomer, filiam Debelaim : et concepit, et peperit ei filium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֙לֶךְ֙ וַיִּקַּ֔ח אֶת־גֹּ֖מֶר בַּת־דִּבְלָ֑יִם וַתַּ֥הַר וַתֵּלֶד־ל֖וֹ בֵּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: So he went and took Gomer, the daughter of Debelaim: and she conceived, and bore him a son.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän meni ja otti Gomerin, Diblaimin tyttären, joka tuli raskaaksi, ja synnytti hänelle pojan.
verses.king_james: So he went and took Gomer the daughter of Diblaim; which conceived, and bare him a son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad eum : Voca nomen ejus Jezrahel, quoniam adhuc modicum, et visitabo sanguinem Jezrahel super domum Jehu, et quiescere faciam regnum domus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלָ֔יו קְרָ֥א שְׁמ֖וֹ יִזְרְעֶ֑אל כִּי־ע֣וֹד מְעַ֗ט וּפָ֨קַדְתִּ֜י אֶת־דְּמֵ֤י יִזְרְעֶאל֙ עַל־בֵּ֣ית יֵה֔וּא וְהִ֨שְׁבַּתִּ֔י מַמְלְכ֖וּת בֵּ֥ית יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to him: Call his name Jezrahel: for yet a little while, and I will visit the blood of Jezrahel upon the house of Jehu, and I will cause to cease the kingdom of the house of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi hänelle: Nimitä häntä Jisreeliksi; sillä vielä on vähän aikaa, ja minä tahdon etsiä veren viat Jisreelissä, Jehun huoneen päälle, ja lopettaa Israelin huoneen valtakunnan.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto him, Call his name Jezreel; for yet a little while, and I will avenge the blood of Jezreel upon the house of Jehu, and will cause to cease the kingdom of the house of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et in illa die conteram arcum Israël in valle Jezrahel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֖ה בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֑וּא וְשָֽׁבַרְתִּי֙ אֶת־קֶ֣שֶׁת יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל בְּעֵ֖מֶק יִזְרְעֶֽאל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in that day I will break in pieces the bow of Israel in the valley of Jezrahel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siihen aikaan pitää tapahtuman, että minä tahdon rikkoa Israelin joutsen Jisreelin laaksossa.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass at that day, that I will break the bow of Israel in the valley of Jezreel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et concepit adhuc, et peperit filiam. Et dixit ei : Voca nomen ejus, Absque misericordia, quia non addam ultra misereri domui Israël, sed oblivione obliviscar eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּ֤הַר עוֹד֙ וַתֵּ֣לֶד בַּ֔ת וַיֹּ֣אמֶר ל֔וֹ קְרָ֥א שְׁמָ֖הּ לֹ֣א רֻחָ֑מָה כִּי֩ לֹ֨א אוֹסִ֜יף ע֗וֹד אֲרַחֵם֙ אֶת־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל כִּֽי־נָשֹׂ֥א אֶשָּׂ֖א לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she conceived again, and bore a daughter, and he said to him: Call her name, Without mercy: for I will not add any more to have mercy on the house of Israel, but I will utterly forget them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän taas tuli raskaaksi ja synnytti tyttären. Ja hän sanoi hänelle: Nimitä se Loryhhamaksi; sillä en minä enää armahda Israelin huonetta, mutta tahdon heidät peräti heittää pois.
verses.king_james: And she conceived again, and bare a daughter. And God said unto him, Call her name Lo–ruhamah: for I will no more have mercy upon the house of Israel; but I will utterly take them away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et domui Juda miserebor, et salvabo eos in Domino Deo suo ; et non salvabo eos in arcu et gladio, et in bello, et in equis, et in equitibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־בֵּ֤ית יְהוּדָה֙ אֲרַחֵ֔ם וְהוֹשַׁעְתִּ֖ים בַּיהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵיהֶ֑ם וְלֹ֣א אוֹשִׁיעֵ֗ם בְּקֶ֤שֶׁת וּבְחֶ֙רֶב֙ וּבְמִלְחָמָ֔ה בְּסוּסִ֖ים וּבְפָרָשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will have mercy on the house of Juda, and I will save them by the Lord, their God: and I will not save them by bow, nor by sword, nor by battle, nor by horses, nor by horsemen.
verses.finnish_biblia: Juudan huonetta tahdon minä kuitenkin armahtaa, ja auttaa heitä Herran, heidän Jumalansa kautta; ja en minä tahdo heitä auttaa joutsella, miekalla, sodalla, oriilla taikka ratsasmiehillä.
verses.king_james: But I will have mercy upon the house of Judah, and will save them by the Lord their God, and will not save them by bow, nor by sword, nor by battle, by horses, nor by horsemen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ablactavit eam quæ erat Absque misericordia. Et concepit, et peperit filium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּגְמֹ֖ל אֶת־לֹ֣א רֻחָ֑מָה וַתַּ֖הַר וַתֵּ֥לֶד בֵּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she weaned her that was called Without mercy. And she conceived, and bore a son.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin hän oli Loryhhaman vieroittanut, niin hän taas siitti ja synnytti pojan.
verses.king_james: Now when she had weaned Lo–ruhamah, she conceived, and bare a son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit : Voca nomen ejus, Non populus meus, quia vos non populus meus, et ego non ero vester.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֕אמֶר קְרָ֥א שְׁמ֖וֹ לֹ֣א עַמִּ֑י כִּ֤י אַתֶּם֙ לֹ֣א עַמִּ֔י וְאָנֹכִ֖י לֹא־אֶהְיֶ֥ה לָכֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And he said: Call his name, Not my people: for you are not my people, and I will not be yours.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi: Nimitä häntä Loammiksi; sillä ette ole minun kansani, niin en minäkään ole teidän.
verses.king_james: Then said God, Call his name Lo–ammi: for ye are not my people, and I will not be your God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit numerus filiorum Israël quasi arena maris, quæ sine mensura est, et non numerabitur. Et erit in loco ubi dicetur eis : Non populus meus vos : dicetur eis : Filii Dei viventis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽ֠הָיָ֠ה מִסְפַּ֤ר בְּנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ כְּח֣וֹל הַיָּ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹֽא־יִמַּ֖ד וְלֹ֣א יִסָּפֵ֑ר וְֽ֠הָיָ֠ה בִּמְק֞וֹם אֲשֶׁר־יֵאָמֵ֤ר לָהֶם֙ לֹא־עַמִּ֣י אַתֶּ֔ם יֵאָמֵ֥ר לָהֶ֖ם בְּנֵ֥י אֵֽל־חָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the number of the children of Israel shall be as the sand of the sea, that is without measure, and shall not be numbered. And it shall be in the place where it shall be said to them: You are not my people: it shall be said to them: Ye are the sons of the living God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Israelin lasten luku pitää oleman niinkuin meren hiekka, jota ei mitata eikä luettaa taideta; ja pitää tapahtuman, että siinä paikassa, missä heille sanottiin: Ette ole minun kansani, pitää heille sanottaman: Te elävän Jumalan lapset.
verses.king_james: Yet the number of the children of Israel shall be as the sand of the sea, which cannot be measured nor numbered; and it shall come to pass, that in the place where it was said unto them, Ye are not my people, there it shall be said unto them, Ye are the sons of the living God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et congregabuntur filii Juda et filii Israël pariter ; et ponent sibimet caput unum, et ascendent de terra, quia magnus dies Jezrahel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠נִקְבְּצ֠וּ בְּנֵֽי־יְהוּדָ֤ה וּבְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ יַחְדָּ֔ו וְשָׂמ֥וּ לָהֶ֛ם רֹ֥אשׁ אֶחָ֖ד וְעָל֣וּ מִן־הָאָ֑רֶץ כִּ֥י גָד֖וֹל י֥וֹם יִזְרְעֶֽאל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of Juda, and the children of Israel, shall be gathered together: and they shall appoint themselves one head, and shall come up out of the land: for great is the day of Jezrahel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Juudan lapset ja Israelin lapset pitää kokoontuman ja pitämän heitänsä yhden pään alla, ja menemän ylös pois maasta; sillä Jisreelin päivä pitää suuri oleman.
verses.king_james: Then shall the children of Judah and the children of Israel be gathered together, and appoint themselves one head, and they shall come up out of the land: for great shall be the day of Jezreel.
